sys_update_version.name: sp_instance_menu_0b38fd5e47f7b2d080626d1f316d43ca
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance_menu"><sp_instance_menu action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>false</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>false</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,tablet,mobile</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css/><glyph/><id/><order>2</order><placeholder_dimensions>{	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) { return {	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}; }]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><!-- 
	AngularJS template with configurable options.
	Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior.
	Example: Display an element when max row count is 10:
	<div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div>
	The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders.
-->
	<div class="skeleton-container">
	<!-- Header Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div>
	<!-- Body Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="2">a487b51e47f7b2d080626d1f316d43e4</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="Icon Menu List">88979930cb01020000f8d856634c9caa</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance_menu</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-25 11:28:14</sys_created_on><sys_id>0b38fd5e47f7b2d080626d1f316d43ca</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name/><sys_package display_value="MyDesign" source="x_492360_mydesign">8d9ca96987c825107653fd57dabb3584</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="MyDesign">8d9ca96987c825107653fd57dabb3584</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_menu_0b38fd5e47f7b2d080626d1f316d43ca</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-25 11:28:14</sys_updated_on><title/><url/><widget_parameters/></sp_instance_menu><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=0b38fd5e47f7b2d080626d1f316d43ca"/></record_update>
